sentences.translation: Musliman se budi rano za sabah-namaz.
sentences.translationEn: The Muslim wakes up early for the Fajr prayer.

sentences.translation: Uzima abdest, klanja, a zatim pije kafu.
sentences.translationEn: He performs ablution, prays, then drinks coffee.

sentences.translation: Jutro je mirno i ugodno vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: The morning is a quiet and pleasant time.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ يَقْرَأُونَ القُرْآنَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translationEn: Many people read the Quran in the morning.
